---
title: "Comments and Revisions Test"
format: docx
---

Test [~~Author~~]{.del id="rev_0"}
last-modified

## Testing comments
This paragraph contains [a comment on this phrase]{.comment id="3"} to demonstrate the comment round-trip workflow.
Here is another paragraph with [multiple words]{.comment id="4"} that have a comment attached.

## Testing revisions ([track changes)]{.comment id="6"}
This paragraph demonstrates insertions: [this text was added]{.ins id="rev_7"} by a reviewer.
This paragraph demonstrates deletions: [~~this text was removed~~]{.del id="rev_8"} by an editor.
Here is a paragraph with both inserted content and in the same sentence.

## Mixed content
The committee [recommends]{.comment id="12"} that the [updated]{.ins id="rev_13"} guidelines be [~~immediately~~]{.del id="rev_14"} adopted [within the next quarter]{.ins id="rev_15"}.

## Normal content
This paragraph has no comments or revisions - it should render normally.

- Bullet point one
- Bullet point two
- Bullet point three

[This is a test of adding new changes.]{.ins id="rev_17"}
